# Matrix Spins security disclosure
# https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc9116

Contact: mailto:security@msaart.online
Preferred-Languages: en
Canonical: https://msaart.online/.well-known/security.txt
Policy: https://msaart.online/responsible-gambling.html
Hiring: https://msaart.online/

# Please do not run automated scans against production infrastructure.
# If you find a vulnerability that affects balances, authentication,
# or NFT receipts, report it by email. We will respond within 72 hours.
